---
title: "Cookbook: Monorepo Scopes"
---

```yaml
scopes:
  api:
    desc: API service
    paths: ["services/api/", "internal/api/"]

  web:
    desc: Web app
    paths: ["apps/web/"]

tasks:
  api-test:
    desc: API tests
    cmd: go test ./services/api/...
    scope: api

  web-test:
    desc: Web tests
    cmd: npm test --prefix apps/web
    scope: web
```

Use `qp plan` / `qp diff-plan` to focus checks by changed files.
